prompt: Create a cinematic anime-style scene of a young red-haired fantasy warrior woman with a long high ponytail sitting on a round stool at the counter of a narrow Japanese ramen shop at night. She wears dark red and black leather armor with gold trim, belts, straps, arm guards, thigh straps, and tall boots, leaning forward casually while holding chopsticks and lifting noodles from a steaming bowl of ramen. Her other hand rests on the brushed metal counter. The ramen bowl glows warmly with steam curling upward in visible white wisps. The setting is an intimate alley-side ramen bar with a stainless-steel counter, chopstick holders, condiment bottles, jars of chili oil, cooking pots, tiled walls, hanging menu boards with Japanese writing, and a cook blurred in the background behind the counter. Outside the open entrance is a wet nighttime city alley with reflections on the pavement, soft bokeh lights, signage, and a red lantern. Use warm amber interior lighting contrasted with cool dark blue street tones, shallow depth of field, realistic environmental detail, glossy reflections, cinematic composition, 3/4 side view, medium-wide framing, highly detailed anime illustration blended with photorealistic background textures. Add a square soft blur censor block over the character's face, centered on the face, obscuring facial features. Mood: cozy, atmospheric, urban, slightly gritty, late-night meal after battle.
